case_title: PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP VS. GILBERT ENRIQUE BRAVO ROA

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY LENIA RODRIGUEZ--LEGAL ASSISTANT COLLECTION DEPT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,376.97 FILED BY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO ROA, GILBERT ENRIQUE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $55.00 SERVED AUG-20-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BRAVO ROA, GILBERT ENRIQUE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2014 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-17-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
